description: The 'Ndrina Mancuso is a powerful 'Ndrangheta clan based in Limbadi and Nicotera, in the province of Vibo Valentia, Calabria. Considered the most influential clan in the province, it is involved in international cocaine trafficking, extortion, usury, public procurement fraud, and money laundering. The clan has alliances with other 'Ndrangheta families, Colombian cartels, and the FARC, and operates in northern Italy, central Italy, and abroad, notably in Togo. It has been described as the financially most powerful criminal clan in Europe.

country_links.context: The Mancuso extend their cocaine trafficking operations into Australian territory.
The Mancuso organization had members arrested in Bulgaria during Operation Rinascita-Scott.

country_links.evidence_quote: La droga proveniva dal Cile , dal Venezuela e dalla Colombia...
country_links.context: The Mancuso organization sourced cocaine from Chile.

country_links.context: The Mancuso organization sourced cocaine from Colombia.
The Mancuso organization had members arrested in Germany during Operation Rinascita-Scott.

country_links.context: The Mancuso organization routed cocaine through the Netherlands.

country_links.evidence_quote: L'incontro con i narcos per l'accordo sullo scambio avveniva invece in Spagna.
country_links.context: The Mancuso organization met with narcos in Spain to arrange drug deals.
The Mancuso organization had members arrested in Switzerland during Operation Rinascita-Scott.

country_links.evidence_quote: la 'ndrina è attiva anche all'estero in particolare in Togo dove cura la sua principale attività criminale
country_links.context: The 'ndrina is active in Togo, where it manages its main criminal activity, using Africa as a logistics hub for international cocaine trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: ...ma veniva distribuita anche nel Regno Unito.
country_links.context: The Mancuso organization distributed cocaine in the United Kingdom.
